description_long: This is a two-story house with a rustic brick and stone facade, featuring a tiled gable roof and a prominent chimney. The front of the house displays two distinct entry doors, one with a decorative metal grille and the other wooden, as well as a small balcony with classical balustrades above. The upper floor has arched windows framed by columns and green shutters, while the lower floor includes a striped awning over one window. The side and rear walls are mostly plain brick, with some weathered plaster patches and additional windows, some with shutters and striped curtains. A small balcony juts out from one side, supported by brackets, and the house sits on a tiled base that suggests an urban sidewalk or courtyard setting. The overall appearance is reminiscent of Mediterranean or Venetian urban architecture, with a mix of stone, plaster, and wood elements.
description: A two-story brick and stone house with a tiled gable roof, arched windows, balconies, and decorative shutters, evoking a Mediterranean or Venetian urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two entry doors, a balcony with balustrades, arched windows, and a striped awning.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain brick wall, the side of the balcony, and the chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view with two upper windows with shutters and curtains, a weathered plaster patch, and a single lower door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large window with a balcony railing and a single shuttered window above.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with arched and rectangular windows, some with shutters and awnings
attribute_entryway_design: Two main doors at street level, one with a decorative grille and the other wooden, no porch, with a balcony and columns above
